Fix a WSL username mismatch bug in BrickLayerHub that causes three data panels (Most Read Files, Hook Latency, What Changed Today) to show empty in the Token Insights tab.

The three path resolvers use `path.basename(homedir())` to build the WSL UNC fallback path, which gives `trg16`. Fix a bug in the BrickLayer token logger hook where the same session_id gets 60-100 entries in the log, filling the 500-line cap and crowding out history from other days. The weekly budget panel in Kiln only shows 2 active days because of this.

**Root cause:** `masonry-token-logger.js` appends a new entry on every Stop event for the same session. A long session can generate 60-100 entries. With a 500-line cap, only ~12 unique sessions fit, covering just 4 days.
